description: Designed title-card graphic in portrait format reading 'CASE SPOTLIGHT'. The background is a dark blue-gray textured surface. At the top, a black flashlight hangs from a cord, its lens pointed downward and casting a bright bluish-white triangular beam down the center of the image. The headline text sits in the beam at lower-center: 'CASE' in white block capitals and 'SPOTLIGHT' in large bold golden-yellow block capitals. A darker horizontal band runs along the bottom, where the circular DHS seal and the white 'ICE' wordmark are centered. There are no people or case details on the image itself.
